Absolutely! Here’s a **cheap, simple, 7-day meal plan** tailored to your requirements and preferences. All meals are **gluten-free**, **lactose-free**, **onion-free**, and avoid shellfish. I’ve focused on affordable, easy-to-source ingredients, minimal prep, and bold flavors without excess salt or sweetness.

---

## General Tips
- Use **gluten-free wraps/tortillas** and **pasta** (rice, corn, or chickpea-based).
- For dairy, use **lactose-free yogurt/milk** or coconut milk.
- Store leftovers for lunch the next day to save time and money.
- Adjust spices to your taste, especially since you’re a super-taster.

---

## Day 1
**Breakfast:** Scrambled eggs with spinach and tomato  
**Lunch:** Leftover Dinner (see below)  
**Dinner:** Mexican Beef & Potato Skillet  
- Diced beef, potatoes, bell pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, garlic, chopped tomato, lime

---

## Day 2
**Breakfast:** Rice cakes with peanut butter and banana  
**Lunch:** Chicken & Veggie Rice Bowl  
- Grilled chicken breast, steamed rice, carrot, cucumber, coriander, lime  
**Dinner:** Thai-Style Minced Pork & Green Beans  
- Pork mince, green beans, garlic, ginger, gluten-free soy sauce, chili (optional), served with rice

---

## Day 3
**Breakfast:** Oats (gluten-free) with berries and seeds, made with water or lactose-free milk  
**Lunch:** Leftover Thai Pork & Green Beans  
**Dinner:** Simple Beef & Potato Curry (Indian-inspired)  
- Diced beef, potatoes, carrots, ginger, garlic, turmeric, cumin, coriander, coconut milk, served with rice

---

## Day 4
**Breakfast:** Fried eggs and sautéed mushrooms  
**Lunch:** Tuna & Potato Salad  
- Canned tuna in olive oil, boiled potatoes, green beans, capers, parsley, lemon juice  
**Dinner:** Mexican Chicken Fajita Bowl  
- Chicken breast, bell peppers, paprika, cumin, garlic, served with rice and avocado

---

## Day 5
**Breakfast:** Rice porridge with cinnamon and apple  
**Lunch:** Leftover Chicken Fajita Bowl  
**Dinner:** Thai Red Curry with Beef  
- Beef strips, bell pepper, zucchini, Thai red curry paste (gluten-free), coconut milk, rice

---

## Day 6
**Breakfast:** Omelette with tomato and herbs  
**Lunch:** Simple Lentil & Veg Soup  
- Brown lentils, carrot, celery, garlic, tomato, cumin, coriander  
**Dinner:** Indian-Spiced Chicken & Potato Tray Bake  
- Chicken thighs, potatoes, carrot, turmeric, garam masala, ginger, served with steamed rice

---

## Day 7
**Breakfast:** Smoothie (banana, spinach, lactose-free yogurt, chia seeds)  
**Lunch:** Leftover Chicken & Potato Tray Bake  
**Dinner:** Mexican Beef Chili  
- Beef mince, kidney beans, diced tomato, bell pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder (optional), served with rice

---

## Snacks (as needed)
- Fresh fruit (apples, bananas, oranges)
- Carrot and cucumber sticks
- Handful of nuts (almonds, peanuts)
- Rice cakes

---

**Shopping List (Basics):**
- Eggs, chicken breast/thighs, beef mince/strips, pork mince, canned tuna
- Potatoes, rice, carrots, cucumber, bell peppers, tomato, spinach, zucchini, green beans, mushrooms
- Lentils, kidney beans, canned tomatoes
- Gluten-free tortillas/wraps, gluten-free oats, rice cakes
- Coconut milk, lactose-free milk/yogurt
- Spices: cumin, coriander, turmeric, smoked paprika, garam masala, chili powder, ginger, cinnamon
- Fresh herbs: parsley, coriander
- Peanut butter, olive oil, lemon, lime

---

**Let me know if you want recipes for any specific meal or further adjustments!**
